_meta.name: Skyyrose Design System Tokens
_meta.notes: Source of truth for assets/css/design-tokens.css. The CSS is generated from this JSON. Repo convention is 'design-tokens.css' (existing file with min + sourcemap), not 'tokens.css' as WP §5.1 originally specified. PLAN_INDEX.md resolves the conflict.

dark.description: Brand black — only black used; backgrounds, body text on light surfaces

neutral._note: 5 grays — populated in Phase 4 from existing design-tokens.css analysis. Do NOT introduce arbitrary grays.

typography._note: 6 universal type roles (+ 4 bespoke collection name-scripts as lockup images, never interior type). All declared in theme.json Font Library. Zero Google Fonts CDN. Source of truth: SOT.md -> data/brand/typography.json.

mono.use: Code / technical labels — system monospace (ui-monospace, no woff2)

scale._note: 8 levels per WP §5.1 — populated Phase 4 with measured rem values from existing design-tokens.css

weight._note: Specified weights only per type family — populated Phase 4

spacing._rule: WP §5.1 — token scale only, no arbitrary values

radius._rule: WP §5.1 — most surfaces 0 or 2; 8+ only when intentional

shadow._rule: WP §5.1 + §5.3 #6 — premium = restrained shadows. No drop-shadow stacks.

motion._rule: WP §5.1 + §5.3 #4 — slow motion (default 400ms), 4 named easing curves

slow.use: scroll-driven cinematic moments (Three.js scenes, hero reveals)

easing._note: 4 named curves — populated Phase 4 from existing audit

z_index._rule: WP §5.1 — named layers, not arbitrary numbers

_phase_4_actions: Audit existing wordpress-theme/skyyrose-flagship/assets/css/design-tokens.css for all TBD-marked values
Pull theme.json presets via mcp__claude_ai_WordPress_com__wpcom-mcp-site-editor-context (per cost-cap-policy.md autonomous tier)
Reconcile CSS variables with this JSON; update both atomically when any token changes
Generate the 9 design system component primitives (Phase 0 Deliverable H) using these tokens
